li.label: severe depression
li.description: I can barely summon the energy to move. Everything feels hopeless.

li.label: mild depression
li.description: I'm feeling down today. Everything seems harder than it should be.

li.label: stable
li.description: I feel normal today. Not too high, not too low.

li.label: mild mania
li.description: I feel energized and motivated today. I can get so much done!

li.label: severe mania
li.description: I feel unstoppable! I can do anything!
